title: Read and interpret work orders and working drawings
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Read and interpret work orders and working drawings demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Review work order and working drawings

pcs.text: Obtain and review set of instructions associated with work order according to workplace procedures1.2 Identify symbols, codes, legends and diagrams in the working drawing 1.3 Identify products, systems, components and items represented in the working drawing 1.4 Identify and confirm job specifications with relevant personnel
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Obtain and review set of instructions associated with work order according to workplace procedures1.2 Identify symbols, codes, legends and diagrams in the working drawing 1.3 Identify products, systems, components and items represented in the working drawing 1.4 Identify and confirm job specifications with relevant personnel?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain and review set of instructions associated with work order according to workplace procedures1.2 Identify symbols, codes, legends and diagrams in the working drawing 1.3 Identify products, systems, components and items represented in the working drawing 1.4 Identify and confirm job specifications with relevant personnel.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Review work order and working drawings

elements.title: Interpret working drawings

pcs.text: Determine required materials and equipment from drawing, using suitable information sources2.2 Identify required specifications and drawing types 2.3 Estimate material, equipment and production time
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine required materials and equipment from drawing, using suitable information sources2.2 Identify required specifications and drawing types 2.3 Estimate material, equipment and production time?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine required materials and equipment from drawing, using suitable information sources2.2 Identify required specifications and drawing types 2.3 Estimate material, equipment and production time.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Interpret working drawings

elements.title: Check that working drawings reflect work order

pcs.text: Check drawing to confirm that it represents specifications in work order3.2 Store drawing for later retrieval according to workplace procedures3.3 Complete workplace documents according to workplace procedures3.4 Record and store outcomes of check according to workplace procedures

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check drawing to confirm that it represents specifications in work order3.2 Store drawing for later retrieval according to workplace procedures3.3 Complete workplace documents according to workplace procedures3.4 Record and store outcomes of check according to workplace procedures.
